subcodes.title: Words to an English friend, spoken on 1913-03-31
subcodes.first_line: Whosoever with a contrite heart prays and begs from Bahá'u'lláh help and assistance will be aided, even if he is not a Bahá'í, only that he is sincere and whole-hearted in his prayers.
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
